description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy stage and a job named deploy_to_production. The job runs in the deploy stage, targets the production environment, and executes the exact shell command GIT_SSH_COMMAND="ssh -i ~gitlab-runner/.ssh/push_to_prod" git push --force git@gitlab.gitlabtutorial.org:root/example4.git +HEAD:production. Use the default Docker image provided by GitLab Runner. No additional variables, caches, or artifacts are required.
